questionHtml: Calculate the percentage of water by mass in the NaCl•2H2O crystals. Use the data from section 6 of the data booklet and give your answer to two decimal places.
markschemeHtml:
Mr = 94.48

« 2 ( 1.01 × 2 + 16.00 ) 94.48 × 100 = » 38.15 «%»

Award M2 only if answer is to 2 decimal places.

Award [2] for correct final answer.

Award [1 max] for 38.10 %.
